title: Preserve Evidence Uninstall Proposal

sources.reason: Manifest and ownership facts for uninstall proposal.

riskAssessment.reason: Proposal must separate Disable, Preserve-evidence Uninstall, and Purge while retaining evidence by default.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Preserve-evidence is the default; project-owned files and audit evidence must never be silently deleted.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Proposal supports Disable, Preserve-evidence Uninstall, and Purge modes with explicit confirmation state.

Phase A proposal records manifest and drift decisions, an ownership-classified deletion list, an evidence export bundle reference, a detached uninstaller handoff, and an uninstall receipt requirement.
Preserve-evidence retains bootstrap evidence, archives, decisions, project policy, baseline, and audit evidence.
Modified template/shared/project-owned content blocks deletion and tests/documentation cover all modes.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Uninstall preparation must not conflate temporary disable, runtime removal, and destructive purge, or lose the evidence needed to audit the removal.
constraints: Preserve-evidence retains all bootstrap and governance evidence and project-owned content.
Modified, drifted, shared, or unknown ownership blocks deletion and provides a resume condition.
intent.rationale: Separating Phase A proposal from detached execution makes evidence export and deletion boundaries reviewable.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement a confirmation-gated preserve-evidence uninstall proposal with three explicit modes.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Three uninstall modes are explicit and unconfirmed proposal performs zero writes.
Preserve-evidence retains governance and project-owned evidence.
Drift or unknown ownership blocks deletion.
Phase A records detached handoff and receipt requirements.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
